_comment: Copy this file to amplify_outputs.json in this directory.
OPTION A — Use the shared contributor Cognito pool (easiest, no AWS account needed):
Just copy this file as-is: cp amplify_outputs.example.json amplify_outputs.json
You can log in with any email address via OTP, or use the review-login bypass
(test@yosemitecrew.com) when enableReviewLogin is active on the dev API.
This pool is a shared development environment — do not store sensitive data in it.
OPTION B — Use your own AWS Amplify sandbox (isolated, requires AWS account):
Follow the README Step 3 to run `npx ampx sandbox`.
It will generate a fresh amplify_outputs.json pointing to your own Cognito pool.
Replace this file with that output.
